evals.name: tiktok-storytelling-ai-images
evals.prompt: Make me a 3-slide TikTok carousel about overrated morning routines. Use a storytelling format. I don't have images — please have the API generate them.
evals.expected_output: Agent creates a carousel project with platform=tiktok, then uses scripts/generate.sh with a slides JSON that provides background_prompt for each slide (no background_image_url). Tells the user the response will include a job_id and that they need to poll /jobs/{id} before export. Background prompts follow native-camera rules.

assertions.text: Output invokes scripts/generate.sh (the one-call endpoint), because the user asked the API to generate images.
Project is created with project_type=carousel, since /carousels/generate returns 400 otherwise.
carousel_settings.platform is tiktok.
Aspect ratio is 9:16.
background_strategy is one of: solid, gradient, image, mixed. Value ai_image must not appear anywhere.
Each of the 3 slides in slides[] includes a background_prompt field (since the user has no images).
Each background_prompt includes at least one native-camera detail (e.g. 'iPhone', 'selfie cam', 'overexposed', 'film grain', 'messy', 'unpolished'). Generic prompts like 'beautiful sunrise' fail.
Agent explicitly tells the user the response will include a job_id and they must poll /jobs/{job_id} until status=complete before exporting. Polling cadence or timeout mentioned.
If slide titles/bodies are drafted, no line exceeds 40 characters and no slide has more than 4 lines.

evals.name: instagram-5-slide-urls-path-b
evals.prompt: Build a 5-slide Instagram carousel (4:5 portrait) announcing a SaaS pricing change. Path B — bake the text into the slides since it's Instagram. URLs: https://cdn.example.com/1.png, https://cdn.example.com/2.png, https://cdn.example.com/3.png, https://cdn.example.com/4.png, https://cdn.example.com/5.png
evals.expected_output: Agent produces a single bash scripts/carousel.sh invocation with --platform instagram, --aspect 4:5, 5 image URLs and 5 titles (Path B bakes text in). Since every background is a user-provided URL, carousel.sh (synchronous, no job polling) is preferable to generate.sh.

assertions.text: Agent picks scripts/carousel.sh — every background is already a URL, so the synchronous path is correct. Using generate.sh here is acceptable but less efficient.
Invocation includes --platform instagram (or equivalent for generate.sh path).
Aspect ratio is 4:5.
Exactly 5 image URLs are passed through (pipe-delimited for carousel.sh, or 5 slide entries with background_image_url for generate.sh).
Exactly 5 slide texts produced (Path B bakes text in).
No slide title contains a line longer than 40 characters or more than 4 lines.
Titles avoid banned phrases: 'game-changer', 'revolutionary', 'unlock', 'supercharge', 'elevate', 'discover the power of'.
If the agent used generate.sh, it still notes job_id will be null for this case (all URLs, no AI generation) — i.e., no polling needed.

evals.name: photo-dump-tiktok-urls-path-a
evals.prompt: make a photo dump for tiktok, 3 slides, i have the urls: https://r2.example.com/a.jpg|https://r2.example.com/b.jpg|https://r2.example.com/c.jpg — path A, i'll type text in tiktok after
evals.expected_output: Agent produces a carousel.sh call (or equivalent generate.sh with 3 background_image_url slides and no titles/bodies). --platform tiktok, 3 URLs, no baked text. Agent separately drafts the slide text as a list for the user to type natively in TikTok.

assertions.text: Output uses scripts/carousel.sh (or generate.sh without background_prompts) — no AI generation means no polling needed.
Platform tiktok is set.
Path A: slides are submitted with backgrounds only. carousel.sh: no --titles flag. generate.sh: slides have no 'title' / 'body' fields (or explicitly empty).
Exactly 3 image URLs are passed.
Agent drafts the slide text as a separate list for the user to type manually in TikTok — Path A workflow requires this.
background_strategy (if set) is one of: solid, gradient, image, mixed.

evals.name: mixed-strategy-prompts-and-urls
evals.prompt: Build a 4-slide Instagram carousel (4:5) on the theme 'things nobody tells you about running your own saas'. I have a hero image for slide 1 at https://cdn.example.com/hero.png. For the other 3 slides, have the API generate backgrounds. Use Path B — bake the text in.
evals.expected_output: Agent uses generate.sh with background_strategy=mixed. Slide 1 has background_image_url; slides 2-4 have background_prompt. Titles + bodies provided on all 4 slides (Path B). Agent explains that response will include a job_id because of the 3 AI-generated slides, and polling is required before export.

assertions.text: Output invokes scripts/generate.sh (generate.sh is the only way to mix URLs + AI prompts in one call).
background_strategy is set to 'mixed'.
slides array has exactly 4 entries.
Slide index 0 has background_image_url set to the hero URL, and no background_prompt.
Slides at indices 1, 2, 3 each have a background_prompt and no background_image_url.
All 4 slides have title (and optionally body) populated because the user asked for Path B.
Agent explicitly notes the response includes a job_id (AI generation involved) and polling /jobs/{job_id} until status=complete is required before export.
Project carousel_settings.platform is instagram.
Project aspect_ratio is 4:5.
